leadText: The Eevee Cup (Japanese: イーブイカップ Eievui Cup) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Eevee Cup serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A cup for big-time Pokémon fans. Kids will happily drink out of it, making it a boon to parents.

sections.title: In the core series games
